name: Ona
postCreateCommand: npm install && npx playwright install chromium
postStartCommand:
mkdir -p ~/.ssh && chmod 700 ~/.ssh && cp /usr/local/secrets/id_ed25519 ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 && cp /usr/local/secrets/id_ed25519_pub ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub && chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 && chmod 644 ~/.ssh/id_ed25519.pub && printf 'Host exe.dev *.exe.xyz
  IdentitiesOnly yes
  IdentityFile ~/.ssh/id_ed25519
  StrictHostKeyChecking accept-new
' > ~/.ssh/config && chmod 600 ~/.ssh/config
